_comment: GENERATED EXAMPLE — These hooks are derived from hook-config.json patterns. Do not hardcode patterns here; update hook-config.json and regenerate. This example shows a TypeScript/React web project, but the same config can generate hooks for any language.

PreToolUse._comment: From hook-config.json > anti_patterns.rules[debug-artifacts] — filter adapted to project language

hooks.command: bash -c 'FILES=$(git diff --cached --name-only -- "*.ts" "*.tsx" "*.js" "*.jsx" | head -50); if [ -n "$FILES" ]; then FOUND=$(echo "$FILES" | xargs grep -l "console\.log\|console\.debug\|debugger" 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$FOUND" ]; then echo "❌ debug-artifacts: Remove debug artifacts before committing"; echo "$FOUND"; exit 1; fi; fi; echo "✅ debug-artifacts: clean"; exit 0'

bash -c 'FILES=$(git diff --cached --name-only -- "*.ts" "*.tsx" "*.js" "*.jsx" "*.py" "*.rs" "*.go" "*.java" | head -50); if [ -n "$FILES" ]; then FOUND=$(echo "$FILES" | xargs grep -ln "TODO\|FIXME\|HACK\|XXX" 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$FOUND" ]; then echo "❌ incomplete-code: Resolve TODO/FIXME markers before committing"; echo "$FOUND"; exit 1; fi; fi; echo "✅ incomplete-code: clean"; exit 0'

bash -c 'FILES=$(git diff --cached --name-only -- "*.ts" "*.tsx" "*.js" "*.jsx" "*.py" "*.rs" "*.go" "*.java" "*.yaml" "*.yml" "*.json" | head -50); if [ -n "$FILES" ]; then FOUND=$(echo "$FILES" | xargs grep -l "password\s*=\s*[\x27\"]\|api_key\s*=\s*[\x27\"]\|secret\s*=\s*[\x27\"]\|token\s*=\s*[\x27\"]" 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$FOUND" ]; then echo "❌ hardcoded-secrets: Never hardcode secrets. Use environment variables."; echo "$FOUND"; exit 1; fi; fi; echo "✅ hardcoded-secrets: clean"; exit 0'

PreToolUse._comment: From hook-config.json > git_flow_enforcement[pr-base-branch-guard] — Block PRs targeting main unless release branch

hooks.command: bash -c 'BRANCH=$(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD 2>/dev/null); if echo "$BRANCH" | grep -q "^release/"; then echo "✅ pr-base-branch-guard: release branch — main target allowed"; exit 0; fi; ARGS="$CLAUDE_TOOL_ARG_command"; if echo "$ARGS" | grep -qE "\-\-base[= ]main"; then echo "❌ pr-base-branch-guard: PRs MUST target develop, not main. Only release/* branches may target main."; exit 1; fi; if ! echo "$ARGS" | grep -q "\-\-base"; then echo "❌ pr-base-branch-guard: --base flag missing. Use --base develop explicitly."; exit 1; fi; echo "✅ pr-base-branch-guard: PR targets integration branch"; exit 0'

PreToolUse._comment: From hook-config.json > git_flow_enforcement[push-to-main-guard] — Block direct push to main

hooks.command: bash -c 'ARGS="$CLAUDE_TOOL_ARG_command"; if echo "$ARGS" | grep -qE "(origin|upstream)\s+main|\smain:|\smain$"; then echo "❌ push-to-main-guard: Direct push to main is FORBIDDEN. Push to your feature branch and create a PR targeting develop."; exit 1; fi; echo "✅ push-to-main-guard: not pushing to main"; exit 0'

PreToolUse._comment: From hook-config.json > git_flow_enforcement[branch-origin-guard] — Warn when branching from main

hooks.command: bash -c 'ARGS="$CLAUDE_TOOL_ARG_command"; if echo "$ARGS" | grep -qE "origin/main|\smain$"; then echo "❌ branch-origin-guard: Feature branches must be created from origin/develop, not main."; exit 1; fi; echo "✅ branch-origin-guard: branch origin OK"; exit 0'

PreToolUse._comment: From hook-config.json > anti_patterns.web_specific[hardcoded-colors] — only for web/fullstack projects

hooks.command: bash -c 'FILES=$(git diff --cached --name-only -- "*.tsx" "*.jsx" "*.vue" "*.svelte" | head -50); if [ -n "$FILES" ]; then FOUND=$(echo "$FILES" | xargs grep -l "blue-[0-9]\|red-[0-9]\|green-[0-9]\|yellow-[0-9]\|gray-[0-9]" 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$FOUND" ]; then echo "❌ hardcoded-colors: Use CSS variables / design tokens instead of hardcoded color classes"; echo "$FOUND"; exit 1; fi; fi; echo "✅ hardcoded-colors: clean"; exit 0'

PostToolUse._comment: From hook-config.json > hook_commands.post_edit — applied to component files

hooks.command: bash -c 'FILE="$CLAUDE_TOOL_ARG_file_path"; if [ -n "$FILE" ] && [ -f "$FILE" ]; then FOUND=$(grep -n "blue-[0-9]\|red-[0-9]\|green-[0-9]\|yellow-[0-9]\|gray-[0-9]" "$FILE" 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$FOUND" ]; then echo "⚠️ hardcoded-colors: Use CSS variables / design tokens instead of hardcoded color classes"; echo "$FOUND"; exit 1; fi; fi; exit 0'

bash -c 'FILE="$CLAUDE_TOOL_ARG_file_path"; if [ -n "$FILE" ] && [ -f "$FILE" ]; then FOUND=$(grep -n "print(.*DEBUG\|breakpoint()\|import pdb" "$FILE" 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$FOUND" ]; then echo "⚠️ debug-artifacts: Remove debug artifacts before committing"; echo "$FOUND"; exit 1; fi; fi; exit 0'
